title: nephrodium rigidum subsp. pallidum
intro: Nephrodium rigidum subsp. pallidum, also known as the pale stiff fern, is a subspecies of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium rigidum subsp. pallidum include its ability to reduce swelling, promote wound healing, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
